description: Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline at .github/workflows/ci.yml with matrix builds, caching, linting, testing, and release binary builds.
steps: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with the following structure: name 'CI', trigger on push (all branches) and pull_request (all branches). Define a 'check' job that runs on ubuntu-latest doing: checkout, install stable Rust toolchain (using dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable), cargo fmt -- --check, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

Define a 'test' job in the same workflow with a matrix strategy for os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]. Steps: checkout, install stable Rust toolchain (dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable), cache cargo registry and target directory (use actions/cache@v4 with key based on runner.os and Cargo.lock hash), run cargo test.

Define a 'build-release' job that depends on ('needs') both check and test jobs. Matrix on os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]. Steps: checkout, install stable Rust toolchain, cache cargo, run cargo build --release, upload the release binary as an artifact using actions/upload-artifact@v4. The binary path differs by OS: target/release/tic-tac-toe on Linux/macOS, target/release/tic-tac-toe.exe on Windows.

Define a separate 'release' job that only runs on tag pushes (if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')). It needs build-release. It downloads all artifacts from the build-release job and creates a GitHub release using softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with the binaries attached.
Ensure the YAML is valid and well-structured. Use proper indentation (2 spaces).
acceptance_criteria: Workflow triggers on push and pull_request to all branches
Matrix build tests on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest
Workflow includes cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo test steps
Workflow includes a release build step with cargo build --release
Cargo dependency and target directory caching is configured
A release job creates GitHub releases on tag pushes with binaries attached
cargo test still passes all 49 tests (no code changes in this feature, just new file)
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Kiro-Test && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml'))" 2>&1 || echo 'YAML validation not available, manual review needed'
